name: codex-3d-asset
description: Generate Codex-ready white-background references with no shadows, then submit them to Tripo 3D.

interface.shortDescription: Generate white-background, no-shadow references in Codex and send them to Tripo 3D.
interface.longDescription: Creates Tripo-ready reference images on a seamless white background with no cast, contact, or ambient shadow, asks for style when needed, accepts example images, supports asset-pack manifests, forces front-view T-pose for characters, and submits the results to Tripo 3D.
defaultPrompt: Crée un personnage low poly en T-pose sur fond blanc sans ombre puis envoie-le à Tripo.
Génère tous les assets pour un match de foot low poly.
Utilise ces images d'exemple pour définir le style avant Tripo.
